# MDLMeshBufferType.index

**Case**

The buffer contains index data for a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLSubmesh] object.

## Declaration

```swift
case index
```

## Constants

- **MDLMeshBufferType.vertex**: The buffer contains per-vertex data for one or more vertex attributes of a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh] object.
